title: Decision-focused learning enhanced by automated feature engineering for energy storage optimisation
title_es: Aprendizaje enfocado en decisiones mejorado por ingeniería automática de características para optimización de almacenamiento de energía
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un enfoque integrado de aprendizaje enfocado en decisiones mejorado con ingeniería de características automatizada para la optimización de sistemas de almacenamiento de energía.
abstract: This paper presents a decision-focused learning approach enhanced by automated feature engineering for optimizing energy storage systems. The integration of machine learning with domain-specific feature engineering demonstrates significant improvements in decision quality for energy management applications.

citations.apa: Alkhulaifi, N., Dogan, I. G., Cargan, T. R., Bowler, A. L., Pekaslan, D., Watson, N. J., & Triguero, I. (2026). Decision-focused learning enhanced by automated feature engineering for energy storage optimisation. Expert Systems with Applications, 302, 130554.
citations.mla: Alkhulaifi, Nasser, et al. "Decision-focused learning enhanced by automated feature engineering for energy storage optimisation." Expert Systems with Applications, vol. 302, 2026, p. 130554.

contributions: Automated feature engineering for energy optimization
